tools.name: list_spaces
tools.description: List Confluence spaces you can access. Use this to discover `spaceId`/`spaceKey` before searching or creating pages. Pagination uses `cursor` from the previous response.

tools.name: get_space
tools.description: Get a Confluence space by `spaceId`, including its homepage and basic metadata.

tools.name: search_pages
tools.description: Search for pages using CQL (Confluence Query Language). Use this as the primary discovery tool to find page IDs. Example CQL: `space = "ENG" AND type = page AND text ~ "onboarding" ORDER BY lastmodified DESC`.

tools.name: read_page
tools.description: Read a page and return agent-friendly Markdown extracted from Confluence storage format (XHTML). Use this to understand page content.

tools.name: get_page_children
tools.description: List child content under a page (typically child pages). Use this to navigate page hierarchies and build a table-of-contents workflow.

tools.name: get_comments
tools.description: List footer comments for a page, optionally including their child replies. Use this to review discussion threads on a page.

tools.name: create_page
tools.description:
Create a new Confluence page. Provide the body as Confluence storage format (XHTML). For simple pages you can use basic HTML like `

`, `

`, `

    `, `
  • `, ``, and links.

tools.name: update_page
tools.description: Update an existing Confluence page. This tool auto-fetches the current version number and increments it, so you don't need to manage versioning. Provide the body as Confluence storage format (XHTML).

tools.name: delete_page
tools.description: Delete a Confluence page (moves it to trash by default). Use carefully.

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Add a footer comment to a Confluence page. Provide the body as Confluence storage format (XHTML). Optionally set `parentCommentId` to create a threaded reply.

tools.name: add_label
tools.description: Add one or more labels to a Confluence page. Labels are useful for discovery via CQL (`label = "..."`).
